name: Transglobal Management Group, Inc.
summary: The Marquie Group, Inc. (TMGI) is an emerging direct-to-consumer firm specializing in marketing, product development, and broadcasting. It owns Music of Your Life (MOYL), the longest-running syndicated music radio network in the world, broadcasting 24/7 to AM, FM, and HD stations across the U.S. and over the internet to 90+ countries. It also holds a 25% stake in Simply Whim, a direct-to-consumer skin care and healthy supplements brand.

products.name: Music of Your Life
products.description: Longest-running syndicated music radio network broadcasting 24/7 to AM, FM, HD stations in the U.S. and streaming to 90+ countries with a catalogue of 100,000+ songs.

products.name: Simply Whim (Whim) Health and Beauty Products
products.description: Direct-to-consumer skin care and healthy supplements brand focused on high-quality, safe, and efficacious beauty-enhancing products formulated from nature, nutrition, and science.

products.name: Street Talk
products.description: Syndicated feature planned for additional revenue stream, to be offered to affiliates on a monthly fee basis.

partnerships.description: TMGI holds 25% of Whim common stock; Whim purchases radio commercials from TMGI for broadcast on the Music of Your Life network.
Provides internet audio distribution system including Reflector service for radio station affiliates with audio tone triggers for local automation computers.
Provides node system for backhauling packet data from broadcast automation system to Reflector, ensuring 99.99% uptime and low latency.
Provides high-speed fiber optic internet connection with 99.99% uptime for broadcasting operations.
